name: part_008
file: tmp_【 超重大告知あり‼ 】 #桃鈴ねね誕生日ライブ2026 ～Liminal～【 桃鈴ねね ⧸ 3DLive 】 [YgZNZM81OcA]_gemini-3-flash-preview\reencoded\part_008.mov

scenes.description: Momosuzu Nene and Usada Pekora performing 'Kimi-Sen!' (君セン！).
Short instrumental transition with a focus on the stage lights.
Momosuzu Nene and Tokoyami Towa performing 'Guitar to Kodoku to Aoi Hoshi' (ギターと孤独と蒼い惑星).
scenes.song_name: Guitar to Kodoku to Aoi Hoshi

subtitles.original: どうやら不安はまだ立っていないみたいだ
subtitles.english: It seems the unrest hasn't settled yet

subtitles.original: んなの気にしない 一直線に綴れ
subtitles.english: I don't care about that, just write in a straight line

subtitles.original: きっとね安定だね お決まりの通常
subtitles.english: Surely it's stable, the usual routine

subtitles.original: 二人きりの空間 賛成はよーオケイ
subtitles.english: A space for just the two of us, agreement is totally okay

subtitles.original: 舞い上がっちゃって あとで反省会 あるよねわかるよ
subtitles.english: Getting all swept away, a review meeting later, it happens I know

subtitles.original: 脳内占拠して眠れないなら そわそわしてたまらないなら
subtitles.english: If you can't sleep with your mind occupied, if you can't stop being restless

subtitles.original: いつだっておいでよ 少しずつ積み上げていこう
subtitles.english: Come over anytime, let's build it up bit by bit

subtitles.original: ようこそ無限のパラダイム もういっそ一緒にいよう
subtitles.english: Welcome to the infinite paradigm, let's just stay together

subtitles.original: とことんまで笑っていてね
subtitles.english: Keep laughing to the very end

subtitles.original: もっとしてほしいんだぞ ちょっと掴んだシャツの裾
subtitles.english: I want more, you know, tugging slightly on your shirt sleeve

subtitles.original: 最上級をプレゼントしよう
subtitles.english: I'll give you the absolute best

subtitles.original: 難しく考えなくてもいいよ ただただ楽しを続けよう
subtitles.english: You don't have to think too hard, let's just keep having fun

subtitles.original: 繋いだ今日が明日になっていくんだ
subtitles.english: The today we connected becomes tomorrow

subtitles.original: よーそろ全速前進で とんでもない景色見に行こう
subtitles.english: Full speed ahead, steady as she goes, let's go see some incredible sights

subtitles.original: 乗りかかっている自覚あるでしょう
subtitles.english: You're aware you're already on board, right?

subtitles.original: 三者そこらの遊びじゃもう満足できないくらい
subtitles.english: Just some casual play won't be enough to satisfy you anymore

subtitles.original: 夢中になれる 夢中にさせる
subtitles.english: You can get lost in it, I'll make you lose yourself

subtitles.original: ようこそ素敵なテーマパーク もういっそ全部忘れちゃえ
subtitles.english: Welcome to the wonderful theme park, just forget everything else

subtitles.original: 幸せはあたしだけ見て
subtitles.english: For happiness, just look at me

subtitles.original: そっと内緒の沼だぞ ちょっと考えられないくらい
subtitles.english: It's a secret swamp, you know, so much that it's hard to imagine

subtitles.original: 愛をあげる 君が好きだ
subtitles.english: I'll give you love, I like you

subtitles.original: 時間なんて関係ないさ 今だってほら笑ってんじゃん
subtitles.english: Time doesn't matter, look, you're laughing even now

subtitles.original: 提案です あたし離さない なんてね
subtitles.english: A proposal: I won't let go. Just kidding

subtitles.original: ギターと孤独と蒼い惑星
subtitles.english: Guitar, Solitude and the Blue Planet

subtitles.original: 突然降る夕立 傘もないやいや
subtitles.english: A sudden evening shower, with no warning

subtitles.original: 空のご機嫌なんか知らない
subtitles.english: I don't care about the sky's mood

subtitles.original: 季節の変わり目の服は 何着ればいいんだろう
subtitles.english: What should I wear during the change of seasons?

subtitles.original: 春と秋 どこいっちゃったのよ
subtitles.english: Where did spring and autumn go?

subtitles.original: 息もできない 五劫の圧力
subtitles.english: A pressure so great I can't even breathe

subtitles.original: 舞の破線 私はどこにいる
subtitles.english: Broken lines of dance, where am I?

subtitles.original: こんなに こんなに 息音(いきろ)がするのに
subtitles.english: Even though there's such a sound of breathing...

subtitles.original: 変だね 世界の音がしない
subtitles.english: It's strange, I can't hear the world

subtitles.original: 足りない 足りない 誰にも気づかれない
subtitles.english: Not enough, not enough, no one notices me

subtitles.original: 殴り書きみたいな音 出せない正体で叫んだよ
subtitles.english: I screamed with an identity unable to make sounds like scribbles

subtitles.original: ありのままなんて 誰に見せるんだ
subtitles.english: To whom should I show my true self?

subtitles.original: 馬鹿な私は 歌うだけ
subtitles.english: A fool like me just sings

subtitles.original: ぶちまけてしまおうか 星に
subtitles.english: Shall I spill it all out to the stars?

subtitles.original: エリソルに張り替える作業も 何度目かなんだ
subtitles.english: How many times have I re-strung this thing?

subtitles.original: 欠けた爪を少し触る
subtitles.english: I touch my chipped fingernail a little

subtitles.original: 半径三百ミリの体で必死に鳴いてる
subtitles.english: Crying out desperately with a body only 300mm wide

subtitles.original: 音楽にとっちゃ ここが地球だな
subtitles.english: To music, this is planet Earth

subtitles.original: 空気を否定して 空を殴るよ
subtitles.english: Denying the air, I punch the sky

subtitles.original: 何にも起きない 私は無力さ
subtitles.english: Nothing happens, I'm powerless

subtitles.original: だけどさ その手で この鉄を弾いたら
subtitles.english: But, you know, if I pluck these strings with those hands...

subtitles.original: 何かが変わって見えた
subtitles.english: Something looked like it changed

subtitles.original: ような まぶしい まぶしい そんなに光るなよ
subtitles.english: Like it was dazzling, dazzling, don't shine so brightly
